name: Ducky One 3 TKL Mist Grey Mechanical Keyboard - PBT Double-Shot Keycaps - Multi-Layered Padding Design - Detachable USB Type-C Cable - Hot-Swappable - Dual-layer PCB - Customizable RGB Lighting (DKON2187ST-PUSPDMIWHHC2)
